pi_items.source: Web search for 'Bayview Grill & Taphouse', 'Bayview Grill & Taphouse Palo Alto', 'Bayview Grill & Taphouse California' - no results found. Multiple Bayview restaurants exist (Bayview Bar & Grill, Bayview Grille, Bayview Inn Bar & Grill) but none with this exact name.

Web searches for '782 Shoreline Boulevard', '782 Shoreline Boulevard California', 'Shoreline Boulevard Palo Alto addresses' - no results found for 782 Shoreline Boulevard. Shoreline Boulevard in Mountain View/Palo Alto area has addresses at 750 N, 883 N, 1401 N, 2000 N, 3160 N but not 782.
Web search results confirm 94301 is a valid ZIP code for Palo Alto, CA
Web search for '650-852-0194 restaurant' and variations - no business or restaurant found with this phone number

privileged_info_summary: Only verified fact: 94301 is a valid Palo Alto, California ZIP code. All other claimed values (restaurant name 'Bayview Grill & Taphouse', address '782 Shoreline Boulevard', and phone '6508520194') are synthetic data not found in public sources. This is a controlled task environment using fictional restaurant information.
